description: Order Payloads for Testing the OrderIntegrationPOC

examples.name: Invalid Order - Missing OrderId
examples.expectedError: Field 'orderId' is required and cannot be empty.

examples.name: Invalid Order - Missing CustomerId
examples.expectedError: Field 'customerId' is required and cannot be empty.

examples.name: Invalid Order - Zero Total
examples.expectedError: Field 'total' must be greater than zero.

examples.name: Invalid Order - Negative Total
examples.expectedError: Field 'total' must be greater than zero.

testingNotes: Use the 'Valid Order' examples to test successful processing (expect 200 OK response)
Use the 'Invalid Order' examples to test error handling (expect 400 Bad Request response)
Each example includes the field structure expected by the Azure Service Bus message and Logic App
The payloads can be sent directly via HTTP POST to the ProcessOrder function endpoint
